wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.dataNotLatest: Unable to reach server — showing cached data. Information may be outdated.
wallet.adjustRange: Adjust the time range to see usage
wallet.cancelSubscription: Cancel subscription at end of period
wallet.stripeRedirect: You'll be redirected to Stripe for secure payment
wallet.billingInvoicesEmptySubtitle: Add funds or make a purchase to generate invoices
wallet.stampPlaceholder: e.g. Optimized the main render loop by 40%...
wallet.balanceExplainer: USD balance is used for marketplace provider sessions (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, etc.)
wallet.creditsExplainer: Credits are used for ORGII Pool sessions. Rate: {{price}} per credit on your {{tier}} plan.
wallet.insufficientBalanceDesc: You need at least ${{required}} to start a session. Your current balance is ${{current}}.
wallet.pricingExplainer1: Included credits reset monthly — use them or lose them
wallet.pricingExplainer2: Overage credits are charged at your plan's overage rate when included credits run out
wallet.pricingExplainer3: Higher plans get lower overage rates and more included credits per dollar

membership.qualifyingExplainer: Based on your activity in the last 90 days
membership.zeroSessionsHint: Start a session to begin earning tier progress. Each session over $1.00 counts toward your membership tier.
membership.howStep1: Completed sessions in the last 90 days count toward tier progress
membership.howStep2: Accumulate qualifying sessions to unlock higher tiers with better pricing and perks
membership.howStep3: Tiers are based on lifetime qualifying sessions — they never reset

market.title: Marketplace
market.addFundsToStart: Add funds to start a session

modelBrowser.noModelsAvailable: No models available yet. Check back later for listings.

modelInfo.noDescription: No model description available. Select this model to view pricing from available providers.

providers.anthropic: Anthropic's Claude family of AI models, known for strong coding, reasoning, and instruction-following capabilities with large context windows.
providers.openai: OpenAI's GPT and reasoning models, offering a wide range from budget to frontier-class with multimodal capabilities.
providers.cursor: Cursor's proprietary models optimized for IDE-integrated AI coding assistance and code completion.
providers.google: Google's Gemini models featuring native multimodal support, massive context windows, and competitive pricing.
providers.deepseek: DeepSeek's open-weight models offering exceptional value with strong coding and reasoning at very low cost.
providers.meta: Meta's open-weight Llama models, freely available for self-hosting with strong general-purpose performance.
providers.xai: xAI's Grok models with strong coding and general-purpose capabilities.
providers.mistral: Mistral AI's efficient models known for fast inference, strong coding, and competitive cost-performance.
providers.alibaba: Alibaba's Qwen models with strong multilingual support and competitive pricing.
providers.github: GitHub Copilot models optimized for code completion and AI-assisted development.

auth.authSessionExpired: Authentication session expired. Please try again.

taskMarket.noMoreTasksDesc: Check back later for new tasks matching your skills.
taskMarket.noTasksForMeDesc: Tasks matching your skills and preferences will appear here.
taskMarket.noTasksAvailableDesc: Browse the marketplace to discover tasks posted by others.

tokenMarket.tierDistributionSubtitle: Listing prices as % of official API price
tokenMarket.noComparisonData: No comparison data available for this model
tokenMarket.savingsSubtitle: Median savings vs official reference price
tokenMarket.noTrendData: No trend data yet — data accumulates daily
tokenMarket.overviewDescription: View all models currently listed on the market from your accounts. Listed models are available for other users to consume via token-based sessions.
tokenMarket.overviewListedModelsText: Shows all models from your listed keys with their enabled/disabled status.

listing.listingMethodDesc: Choose how to add API keys for marketplace listing
listing.notProviderWarningWithSavedKeys: You are not registered as a marketplace provider yet. You already have {{count}} saved key account(s) in Integrations, but listings cannot be published until you finish provider onboarding in Wallet.
listing.notProviderWarningNoSavedKeys: You are not registered as a marketplace provider yet. Open Wallet and complete provider onboarding before creating listings.
listing.noEligibleSavedKeys: No saved keys available to list. Add a key in Integrations first.
listing.apiKeysDesc: Paste one API key per line. Keys will be validated before listing.
listing.officialRate: Official rate: ${{price}}/credit. Set your price (must be > 0).
listing.autoExtractDescription: We'll automatically extract the API key, base URL, and other settings from your input.
listing.validateApiKeyFirst: Validate your API key above to configure model pricing
listing.setPricingPerModel: Set pricing per model (prices are per 1M tokens)
listing.greatDiscount: Great discount - will attract many users!
listing.addModelsAbove: Add models above to configure pricing
listing.noEnvVars: No environment variables. Click "+ Add" to add one.
listing.envVarsHelpText: These will be used when running the agent for consumers.
listing.perCreditDescription: Charge per Kiro credit (price from API)

earnings.earningsWillAppear: Earnings from sessions will appear here
earnings.becomeProviderDesc: Become a provider to start earning from your listings
earnings.stripeDashboardDesc: View detailed payout history, tax forms, and account settings
earnings.payoutHistoryWillAppear: Your payout history will appear here
earnings.payoutSuccess: Payout of {{amount}} requested successfully ({{fee}}% fee deducted)
earnings.sessionsWillAppear: Sessions using your listings will appear here

boost.subtitle: Increase matching priority
boost.providerRequiredDesc: You need a provider account to use boosts.
boost.boostExplanation: Boosts increase your matching score by
boost.boostEffect: , making your listings more likely to be selected.
boost.pickTierHint: Pick a tier below to boost your position
boost.explainer1: Higher tier = higher position = more matches
boost.explainer3: Upgrade anytime by buying a higher tier

cta.suspendedDesc: Reactivate your provider account to list on the marketplace
cta.wantToList: Want to list on the marketplace?
cta.earnFromQuota: Earn from your unused quota by becoming a provider

marketModelSelector.goldRequired: Gold+ membership required to select global pricing

orgiiOrchestrator.name: ORGII Pool
orgiiOrchestrator.description: Managed model pool with flat credit pricing
orgiiOrchestrator.agentDesc: Auto-routes to optimal models with flat credit pricing

turbo.name: Turbo
turbo.description: Fast models for autocomplete and quick edits

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: Strong models for multi-file edits and reasoning

pro_max.name: Pro Max
pro_max.description: Flagship models for complex architecture tasks

modelConfig.title: Model Config
modelConfig.noModels: No models detected for this account
modelConfig.directListingDesc: Your prices, your listing. Full control over pricing per model.
modelConfig.joinPoolDesc: Flat pricing, more traffic. Opt in models to the shared pool.
modelConfig.pricingHint: Set input/output prices per 1M tokens for each enabled model
modelConfig.poolModelsHint: Select which models to contribute to the ORGII shared pool
modelConfig.poolOnlyTitle: {{count}} model(s) available via ORGII Pool only
modelConfig.poolOnlyDesc: These premium models cannot be direct-listed from a proxy account. Opt them into the ORGII Pool to earn from every request routed to you.
modelConfig.allModelsPoolOnly: All your models are premium tier. They can only be sold through the ORGII Pool — enable it below to start earning.
modelConfig.poolOptInDesc: Earn more by contributing models to the shared pool
modelConfig.poolBenefits: The ORGII Pool routes traffic from all consumers to the best available provider. You get automatic demand without setting prices — flat-rate payouts per request, zero marketing effort. Most providers see 2-3x more usage through the pool.
